title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 08 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 08 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 08 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate by 1.05%.the main contract closed 821. the quotation in the morning was increased by 20-30yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see.
